case_title: JIRO YAMAMOTO VS. LOWELL WEBB et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR SEP-06-2005 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-22-2005 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
